Job description

Software Engineering & API Development) Intern – Summer 2026

 

Company Description:

 

Array Technologies was founded more than 30 years ago on the bold vision of advancing the future of clean energy.  Today, we are a global leader and pioneer in the renewables industry. Despite our large footprint – or perhaps because of it – we are united in our mission: Generating Energy with Integrity for a Sustainable World. It is the reason why we are in business, and it motivates our drive every day. Together, with our customers and partners, we share a resolve to advance the renewables industry, curb climate change and realize a sustainable world. 

 

Do you share our passion for sustainability? Help us create a clean energy future.

 

View this video to learn more about Array Technologies.

 

Job Summary: 

 

Through our paid internship program, you’ll gain hands-on experience assisting in the development and implementation of specific marketing projects. You will:

 

Duration of Internship: May 18th, 2026 to August 7th, 2026 

 

Key Job Responsibilities:

 

Assist in transitioning existing engineering design functionality into modular, REST‑based services, supporting integration with modern, web‑based applications.
Design, develop, test, and document software modules, including execution of unit and integration testing and clear documentation of test results.
Participate fully in Agile development processes, including daily stand‑up meetings, sprint planning, and contributing to the successful completion of sprint cycles.
Provide regular progress updates, clearly communicating status, risks, and blockers during daily sprint meetings.
Collaborate with cross‑functional team members and shadow leadership to understand technical requirements, engineering workflows, culture, and operating systems.
Demonstrate ownership, problem‑solving, and initiative by researching technical approaches, proposing improvements, provide clear feedback and contributing fresh ideas.
Participate in a structured summer internship program, gaining exposure to leadership, organizational culture, and operating systems across teams, while performing additional duties as assigned.

 

Qualifications:

Currently enrolled in Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a closely related discipline.
Completion of at least junior-level coursework in programming, data structures, algorithms, and software design principles.
Fundamental knowledge of RESTful APIs, HTTP protocols, and JSON/XML data formats.
Proficiency in at least one programming language such as Python, Java, C#, or JavaScript.
Familiarity with API development frameworks (e.g., Flask, Spring Boot, .NET Core) and version control systems like Git.
Preferred experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
Ability to read and interpret technical documentation, API specifications, and system architecture diagrams.
Strong analytical, problem-solving, communication, and organizational skills, with a high level of attention to detail and the ability to work creatively and strategically.
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced development environment.
Must be legally authorized to work in the U.S. without company sponsorship.
Eagerness to contribute to a team-oriented environment.
This position is located onsite in our Chandler, AZ office.
Relocation is not available for this role.
US Person is required for this role.

 

At Array Tech, Inc, we strive to lead with our culture, and believe that our people are a key enabler of our future state. Our total rewards philosophy supports Array’s ability to attract, develop, and retain our employees. We offer competitive compensation, benefits and wellness programs that align with the local markets where we do business. 

 

Array Tech, Inc. offers equal employment opportunity without regard to race, color, gender, age, creed, sex, religion, national origin, disability (physical or mental), marital status, citizenship, ancestry, sexual orientation, gender identity, and gender expression, or any other legally protected status.

About the employer

Winter 2025 Career Fair Employers

Our mission: Generating energy with integrity for a sustainable world.

Array Technologies is a global leader advancing the future of clean energy. With over 30 years of innovations that have powered the solar industry, Array is uniquely positioned to deliver renewable energy solutions for customers seeking clean energy adoption in markets around the globe. While our strength lies in building the world’s most reliable and efficient utility-scale solar trackers, our expertise, capabilities, and resources position us to extend into additional renewable energy solutions. As pioneers, innovators, and visionaries, we are committed to generating energy with integrity for a sustainable world.

Our story: Follow the sun. Follow the leader.

Our innovations power the renewable energy industry. We’re leading the way to a brighter, smarter future with relentless reliability and an unparalleled track record. Over its 30-year company history, Array Technologies has expanded from its manufacturing base in the United States to become a global provider of time-proven renewable energy solutions. 

In January 2022, Array Technologies acquired one of Europe’s leading tracker manufacturers, STI Norland. Together, we became the largest solar tracker company in the world with manufacturing capacity, design, and engineering resources on three continents. This move established Array as a leader in the rapidly growing Brazilian solar market. While our strength lies in utility-scale solar trackers today, we are committed to generating energy with integrity for a sustainable world tomorrow.

Learn more about Array Technologies, Inc.
